There are few animals in evidence despite the calm, just a handful of birds keeping their distance on the other side of the water. It’s damn peaceful. Nice. Enough to let you forget that you’re on an apocalyptic hellworld for a minute. Almost enough to make you miss some movement in the water. Your hand falls to your weapon, but the tense moment passes when a caramel-skinned beauty breaches the lake’s surface. Flame-red hair shakes out, and pert breasts bounce against a toned, tight body. Johana Creed. And where she is... yeah, there’s your cousin reclining in [rival.hisHer] underwear on the shore. [rival.HeShe] is using that same leithan from the train like a chair, sitting against her flank. She’s still trussed up like before, arms bound and bridle secured in her mouth, but she’s wagging her tail like a puppy watching Johana getting out of the water. None of them have noticed you yet, but it’s only a matter of time if you linger - the gunslinger’s got good instincts, you know that much.
